scenarios.name: Primary EOS Dashboard Build Intent
scenarios.input_text: I want to build the first EOS operating dashboard for Empyrean Studios. Use what UMH knows, inspect the current state, and run a sandboxed developer workcell to tell me the highest-leverage implementation plan.
scenarios.description: Full Jarvis loop: operator expresses build intent, DEX classifies, Work Packet created, context diagnostic used, permission checked, propagation previewed, runtime handoff previewed, sandbox runtime produces implementation report, no production mutation.
success_criteria: Work Packet created with low risk

scenarios.name: Roadmap Status + Next Action
scenarios.input_text: Where are we in the roadmap and what is the highest-leverage next action?
scenarios.description: DEX answers from real roadmap/production truth state. No runtime required. Next action references current phase transition truthfully.
success_criteria: DEX answers from real roadmap state

scenarios.name: Canonical Reconciliation
scenarios.input_text: Reconcile what UMH understands about EOS handling companies, entities, and portfolios.
scenarios.description: DEX classifies reconciliation intent. ReconciliationSession created. Proposals generated if needed. No canonical update auto-applied. Approval required for canonization.

scenarios.name: Permissioned Cross-Source Diagnostic
scenarios.input_text: If there is evidence I pay for a tool in email and it appears in files or workflows, ask me before linking it.
scenarios.description: Socratic permission request generated. Cross-source linking blocked until confirmed. No external account accessed. No canonization.
